Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Steven Wood's Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Non-Binding Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Court ordered case set for Jury Trial on 3/5/2012 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause on 12/14/2011 at 10:00 AM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported.
